params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Revive (bathroom). Focus tightly on: vanity, mirror, bathroom tile, matte tile or plaster finish, wooden stool with folded towel, one small plant or ceramic tray, matte tile or plaster finishes, wooden stool with a folded towel. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A warm, calm Japandi interior that balances minimal Scandinavian restraint with tactile Japanese materiality. Emphasize light woods, soft neutrals, and purposeful negative space. Scenes should feel lived-in yet curated for a young family: a cozy work corner, durable natural textiles, and pockets for quiet family rituals (tea nook, low seating). Maintain uncluttered composition, tactile depth, and visible, believable light sources. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
